data.title: PENGU token dropped by 20% in August following the launch of Pudgy Party game, amidst a general downturn in NFT markets.
data.description: The native cryptocurrency of Pudgy Penguins experienced a challenging period, mirroring a general downturn in NFT markets and digital collectibles.

data.title: FDA approves Biogen, Eisai's at-home shot version of Alzheimer's treatment Leqembi, a highly anticipated therapy.
data.description: Biogen and Eisai have received approval from the FDA for an at-home shot version of their Alzheimer's treatment, Leqembi. This highly anticipated treatment is set to provide patients with a more accessible option for managing the disease. The approval marks a significant milestone in the fight against Alzheimer's.

data.title: Stock market sees losses, Nasdaq hit hardest, Nvidia extends losing streak.Indexes all down; Nasdaq worst hit. Dow sinks.
data.description: On Friday, the stock market experienced declines across major indexes, notably the Nasdaq composite faced the strongest setback. The Dow Jones index dipped, with the Nasdaq suffering even more. Nvidia also extended its losing streak. This information was shared in a live coverage discussing the current state of the stock market.

data.title: First Nordic Metals released Q2 2025 financials, revealing cash balance of C$2.7 million and assets of C$4.3 million. Multiple successful drill programs and acquisitions were highlighted.
data.description: First Nordic Metals Corp. released its unaudited consolidated financial statements for the three-month period ended June 30, 2025. The company announced positive drill results at the Nippas target with assays of up to 2.66 g/t Au. They also launched a 5,000 m Phase 1 diamond drill program and expanded the Aida target program to 10,000 m. Additionally, they completed geochemical surveying and drilling programs at the Harpsund target and identified five new gold anomalies at the Storjuktan project. The company's cash balance as of June 30, 2025, was C$2.7 million with current assets totaling C$4.3 million. They also acquired EMX's Nordic Business Unit and added Brendan Cahill to the Board of Directors.

data.title: Pharmacy chains CVS and Walgreens facing obstacles in Covid vaccine access due to regulatory confusion, may require prescriptions without C.D.C. intervention.
data.description: Pharmacy chains across the country, including the largest ones, are increasingly requesting prescriptions or restricting access entirely due to the impact of state laws and regulatory confusion. This situation is pressing forward unless there is intervention from a C.D.C. panel.

data.title: Dustin Sedgwick named Chief Marketing Officer at Intapp (NASDAQ: INTA), brings tech and finance industry expertise.
data.description: Intapp, a renowned global provider of AI-powered solutions for professionals in advisory, capital markets, and legal sectors, has revealed that Dustin Sedgwick is joining the company as Chief Marketing Officer. Intapp's CEO, John Hall, expressed enthusiasm about Sedgwick's appointment, emphasizing his background in cultivating high-growth ventures within the technology and finance realms. Sedgwick's inclusion in the Intapp leadership team comes at a crucial time as the company progresses on its growth trajectory. Notably, Intapp is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol INTA.

data.title: Stock market drops as Alibaba news affects Nvidia and AI stocks, not signaling repeat of DeepSeek crisis.
data.description: On Friday, the stock market experienced a decline, resulting in the loss of weekly gains due to Alibaba's impact on Nvidia and AI stocks. However, this event should not be compared to the DeepSeek moment. Dow Jones Futures were affected by the news related to Alibaba, influencing Nvidia and AI stocks. The significance of this occurrence should not be exaggerated like the DeepSeek 2.0 incident.
